name: Commodore Perry
description_short: Commodore Perry FCU is a member-owned credit union serving Ohio communities with checking, savings, loans, and financial education programs.
description_long:
Commodore Perry Federal Credit Union is a not-for-profit, member-owned financial cooperative serving communities in Ohio, including Port Clinton, Oak Harbor, and Elmore. The organization operates under NCUA insurance and positions itself as a community-focused alternative to traditional banks. The credit union was established to provide affordable financial services to its members while maintaining deep roots in local communities.

Commodore Perry FCU offers a comprehensive range of consumer and business financial products. On the lending side, they provide home mortgage loans, home equity loans, home improvement loans, auto loans, RV loans, personal term loans, credit builder loans, and Mastercard credit cards. For deposit accounts, members can access multiple checking options (including Kasasa Cash checking with dividend returns), savings accounts, money market accounts, share certificates, and IRAs. The credit union also provides business checking, business savings, cash management services, and merchant card services for small business members.

The institution distinguishes itself through several member-focused features. They offer Kasasa Cash and Kasasa Cash Back checking accounts that pay dividends rather than charging fees, free financial counseling through their B.O.S.S. program, surcharge-free ATM access through shared branching nationwide, and a member referral program with cash rewards. The credit union emphasizes accessibility, including AudioEye accessibility optimization on their website and options like "Use Your Pen, Not Your PIN" for secure transactions. As a Certified CDFI (Community Development Financial Institution), they demonstrate commitment to underserved communities.

Commodore Perry FCU is well-suited for Ohio residents seeking member-owned banking with low or no-fee accounts and competitive lending. The main limitation is geographic availability—membership appears tied to specific Ohio communities, making this unsuitable for those outside their service area. Their website provides solid functionality but lacks detailed rate information and comparison tools, requiring members to contact them directly for specific loan terms and APY/APR figures.
services: Home equity loans and home improvement loans
Personal term loans and credit builder loans
Mastercard credit cards and Mastercard debit cards
Kasasa Cash Back checking (cash back rewards)
Share certificates and Individual Retirement Accounts (IRAs)
Business checking and business savings accounts
pros: Kasasa Cash and Kasasa Cash Back checking accounts pay dividends instead of charging monthly fees
Free financial counseling through B.O.S.S. (Building Opportunities for Saving & Success) program
Nationwide surcharge-free ATM access through shared branching network
Credit builder loans available specifically for members working to establish credit history
Member referral program offering cash rewards for bringing new members
Certified CDFI status demonstrating commitment to community development
No-fee mobile deposit and online banking with 24/7 access
cons: Limited geographic service area restricted to specific Ohio communities (Port Clinton, Oak Harbor, Elmore)
Website lacks transparent rate information—APR/APY figures not displayed, requiring direct contact with credit union
Limited business service details provided online compared to consumer offerings
No mention of credit monitoring, identity theft protection, or advanced digital security features
best_for: Ohio residents in Port Clinton, Oak Harbor, or Elmore seeking low-fee checking with dividend returns
First-time homebuyers and refinancers looking for affordable mortgage options
Small business owners needing basic checking, savings, and merchant services in their service area
Individuals building credit history through structured credit builder loans
diagnosis: Commodore Perry FCU is ideal for Ohio-based members in their service area seeking member-owned banking with fee-free, dividend-paying checking accounts and affordable lending options. The primary caveat is strict geographic limitation to Port Clinton, Oak Harbor, and Elmore area—those outside these communities cannot join or access their services.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Commodore Perry — Credit Union in OAK HARBOR, OH | CreditDoc
meta_description: Commodore Perry — NCUA-insured credit union in OAK HARBOR, OH. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
